member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Services.AgentConfig.AgentConfigService
member.summary: Generates account.json and content.json from gathered activation data. Single agent: writes config/accounts/{handle}/account.json + content.json. Brokerage first agent: bootstraps brokerage config, then writes agent config.json + content.json. Brokerage subsequent agent: skips brokerage bootstrap, just writes agent config files. Does NOT overwrite existing configs.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.AgentConfig.AgentConfigService.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.Storage.IAccountConfigService,RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.Storage.IFileStorageProvider,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Services.AgentConfig.AgentConfigService})
member.summary: Generates account.json and content.json from gathered activation data. Single agent: writes config/accounts/{handle}/account.json + content.json. Brokerage first agent: bootstraps brokerage config, then writes agent config.json + content.json. Brokerage subsequent agent: skips brokerage bootstrap, just writes agent config files. Does NOT overwrite existing configs.
